rationale: Approve the foundational Pantry vertical slice. It is the largest reversible package that creates real user-visible inventory while preserving current recipe, planning, shopping, and cooking behavior. It must include additive product/location/batch/event/mapping tables, safe units and expiry primitives, optimistic transactional services, trusted APIs, top-level Pantry UX, focused tests, and docs. Recipe availability and cross-feature demand/shortage/deduction behavior remain required later phases. A migration/data-integrity Judge review is mandatory immediately after this Worker before any recipe integration.

worker_package.objective: Deliver the foundational event-backed Pantry vertical slice: additive canonical product, alias/identifier, recipe-mapping, location, batch, and event storage; safe unit/expiry domain logic; transactional inventory services with optimistic versions, FEFO consumption and practical undo; validated trusted-origin APIs; a responsive top-level Pantry page with search/filter/add/manage/history flows and core actions; focused tests and native documentation, without changing existing recipe/planner/list/cooking behavior.
verify: pnpm exec prettier --check src/lib/db/schema.ts drizzle/0015_pantry_inventory.sql drizzle/meta/_journal.json src/lib/domain/inventory-units.ts src/lib/domain/pantry.ts src/lib/services/pantry-service.ts src/app/api/v1/pantry src/app/pantry/page.tsx src/components/pantry-manager.tsx src/components/app-header.tsx src/app/globals.css tests/unit/pantry.test.ts tests/integration/pantry-service.test.ts docs/openapi.yaml docs/api.md docs/architecture.md docs/data-model.md docs/security.md docs/testing.md docs/decisions/0028-pantry-inventory-foundation.md
pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/pantry.test.ts
pnpm exec vitest run --project integration tests/integration/pantry-service.test.ts
stop_if: Any applied migration SQL would need to be changed instead of adding 0015_pantry_inventory.sql.
Implementation needs files outside allowed_files; return the exact missing paths before editing them.
A Pantry-only authorization model would contradict the repository's one-household deployment and profile-convenience boundary.
A live OpenAI call, credential access, destructive database operation, or mutation of the normal data/our-recipes.db would be required.

Product-image upload, recipe availability, meal allocation, grocery recommendation, or cooking deduction work becomes necessary to make the foundation compile; keep those seams explicit and stop rather than implementing an unreviewed cross-phase redesign.
Verification fails twice for a cause that cannot be fixed inside allowed_files.

parallel_safety.rationale: The foundation crosses one migration, shared schema, service, APIs, and UI; parallel writers would have overlapping contracts and are not authorized.

missing_evidence: Recipe, planner, grocery, purchase, and cooking integration
Full browser and final oracle suites
required_board_updates: Populate T004 exactly from worker_package and activate it.
After T004, create and activate a migration/data-integrity Judge review before recipe integration.
